topics: Introduction to finance and financial management. Scope of financial management
and financial management decisions. Time value of money - basic computations using compounding and discounting techniques. Major financial decision areas -factors influencing financial decisions
internal and external factors. Financial risk and return concepts. Methods for profit and wealth maximizations
Identification of major financial sources - long term sources of finance - equity shares
preferred stock. Short term sources - bank sources
money markets and mutual funds. Financial statement and analysis
and financial analysis. Major financial statements - income statement
fund flow statement and cash flow statement. Ratio analysis - balance sheet ratios
scope and patterns of capital structure
cost of capital - cost of specific sources of capital. Measurement of cost of capital -weighted average cost of capital. Capital structure theories / approaches - net income approach
and Modigliani-Miller (MM) approach. Planning of domestic and international sources of finance
working capital management. theoretical models of cash management
trade payables and short-term financing. Operating cycles. Capital budgeting - conventional and discounted cash flow (DCF) methods. Decision criteria in capital budgeting
net present value (NPV) - internal rate of return (IRR) comparisons
risk analysis and international capital budgeting
